top_signals.title: Ether-Linked Nonprofit Cuts Budget 40% During ‘Challenging Era’
top_signals.summary: Vitalik Buterin, the programmer who helped create underlying technology for Ether, the world’s No. 2 cryptocurrency, said the nonprofit behind it is being forced to make some difficult decisions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: PGA Tour CEO Brian Rolapp unveils sweeping changes to professional golf
top_signals.summary: Changes to the PGA Tour are designed to elevate competition and raise payouts for winners.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
